description_long: This is a single-story suburban house with a gable roof covered in gray shingles and surrounded by a white picket fence. The front yard features a stone path leading to a small porch adorned with potted plants and a bench, flanked by two large leafy trees that provide ample shade. The house exterior is finished in light-colored siding, and the windows are symmetrically arranged with decorative shutters. The backyard and sides are densely bordered by mature trees, creating a sense of privacy and enclosure. The roofline is complex, with intersecting gables and a prominent central section. The overall setting suggests a cozy, family-oriented home in a quiet neighborhood.
description: A single-story suburban house with a gray gable roof, white picket fence, and large trees shading the yard. The front features a stone path, porch, and symmetrically arranged windows.
description_view_0: Side view showing the intersecting gable roof, dense tree coverage, and partial view of the white picket fence.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entryway with a porch, stone path, two large trees, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_2: Opposite side view dominated by mature trees, with the house partially obscured and the roofline visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the house, intersecting gable roof, and two large trees framing the structure.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front porch with steps, decorative columns, potted plants, and a white picket fence entry.
